title: Six hundred years of reconstructed atmospheric river activity on the US west coast
author: Swatah Snigdha Borkotoky
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: These are the reconstruction data from the article: Six hundred years of reconstructed atmospheric river activity along the US West Coast (under review at the Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmosphere). The earliest start year of the reconstruction are mentioned in the files (either 1916 or 1400) and the corresponding models are mentioned as PCR (Regression) or NN (Neural Network).
steps_raw: These are the reconstruction data from the article: Six hundred years of reconstructed atmospheric river activity along the US West Coast (under review at the Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmosphere). The earliest start year of the reconstruction are mentioned in the files (either 1916 or 1400) and the corresponding models are mentioned as PCR (Regression) or NN (Neural Network).
